title: Dream — Dutch-Bros-job + friend-group blowup, Mar 2022
html:
TL;DR

  • A distinctly emotional dream: Yahir works at a Dutch-Bros-like company, invites kai, Owen, then Andrew over.
  • Escalation: physical altercation with Andrew → friendship over → lashes out at Kai's behavior → burns that bridge too.
  • Ends crying near "Brandon" (likely cousin Brandon) in what was thematically "humiliating but slightly relieving that they were out" — taking place in a TJ-Maxx-style retail setting.
  • Notable as a dream-as-friend-group-pressure-relief-valve — Yahir's dreaming brain rehearsing the cost of cutting his core crew, years before he actually moves alone to austin tx and leaves them in grants pass or / corvallis or.

Key beat

"I was genuinely crying near Brandon because freaking out was humiliating, but it was slightly relieving that they were out."

Why it matters in the graph

  • Sits in the ongoing dream-as-letter-to-self thread alongside 2020 05 07 dream tribal fight, 2020 06 13 dream shooter prep, 2023 03 26 just dreamt pursued, 2023 05 08 dream dad monster, 2024 11 15 dominic dreams, 2020 04 30 dream water game hannah.
  • "Dutch Bros-like company" — Yahir's mom's friend alejandro works at Dutch Bros (referenced in 2024 07 04 questions mega notebook); Dutch Bros recurs as a Grants-Pass-adjacent cultural employer.
  • Pre-figures the actual Sept 2022 friend-group rupture pattern that shows up in the post-college distance narrative of 2024 10 30 thoughts on my future.

Open questions

  • Was there a real-life precipitating fight with Andrew or Kai around this time?
  • "Brandon" — is this the cousin Brandon from the 2025 06 22 wedding list dad's side, or a friend?
